title: DVLA contact centre opening hours: Easter 2025
body: "   Date Opening hours     Good Friday 18 April (bank holiday) closed   Saturday 19 April 8am to 2pm (normal hours)   Easter Sunday 20 April closed   Easter Monday 21 April (bank holiday) closed   Tuesday 22 April 8am to 7pm (normal hours)     Customers will be able to use our online services throughout the Easter period. "
